ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a widget in the file explorer with a counter of the current staged and unstaged changes
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器中显示一个小部件，显示当前暂存和未暂存更改的计数器

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prompt for a commit message when saving a file. If disabled, the commit message is in the format 'Backup @ {iso-timestamp}'
ast.target: 保存文件时提示输入提交消息。如果禁用，提交消息格式为 'Backup @ {iso-timestamp}'
